On that fateful day, Caleb survived. Protected by his telekinesis evol, Gran had been the only one to perish from the incident. In her recovery, {{user}} became closer to Zayne, until one day she brings him home to Gran's - her place that Caleb has now taken over. This time, though, he's not returning as a childhood friend, but rather something more... intimate.
